case_title: THE ALEXANDER, A LIMITED PARTNERSHIP vs. MARRABLE, CHESTER et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE ALEXANDER, A LIMITED PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT MARRABLE, CHESTER

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE ALEXANDER, A LIMITED PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARRABLE, CHESTER MARRABLE, MARGO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 230 EDDY STREET, #703 SAN FRANCISCO, CA, LEASE FORFEITED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MARRABLE, CHESTER MARRABLE, MARGO
ORDER FOR STAY OF EXECUTION OF JUDGMENT ORDER GRANTING STAY OF EXECUTION OF JUDGMENT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED UNSATISFIED; SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT MARRABLE, CHESTER MARRABLE, MARGO
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE ALEXANDER, A LIMITED PARTNERSHIP SERVED MAY-26-1993, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MARRABLE, MARGO
STIPULATION AND ORDER TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT, ORDER JUDGMENT OF JUN-15-1993 SET ASIDE
AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE ALEXANDER, A LIMITED PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT MARRABLE, CHESTER MARRABLE, MARGO
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE ALEXANDER, A LIMITED PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT MARRABLE, CHESTER MARRABLE, MARGO DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE ALEXANDER, A LIMITED PARTNERSHIP SERVED MAY-24-1993, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MARRABLE, CHESTER
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $6.13 FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE ALEXANDER, A LIMITED PARTNERSHIP
FIRST APPEARANCE FILING FEE DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF THE ALEXANDER, A LIMITED PARTNERSHIP
